doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: Document accurately cites real Florida law and court cases but presents a contested legal interpretation of LFO requirements as settled fact when the issue remains subject to ongoing litigation and policy debate.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 62
REASON: The document accurately references real Florida law (Amendment 4, SB 7066, Jones v. DeSantis) and genuine statutory citations, but the framing and interpretation of LFOs as a mandatory voting prerequisite conflates a legally contested issue—the 2020 court decision upheld the requirement, but subsequent litigation and policy changes have created ambiguity about current enforcement.
